summary: Iteration 7 testing for SHORT selling feature completed successfully. All backend tests pass (13/13). Frontend Config page shows Short Selling toggle with ON/OFF switch, warning message, and save functionality. Dashboard and Trade History correctly display SHORT positions with orange badges. Found and FIXED one bug: Dashboard hardcoded 'LONG' badge instead of using position.side.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.js - Fixed hardcoded LONG badges to use position.side and trade.side with correct styling
/app/backend/tests/test_short_selling.py - Created comprehensive test suite for SHORT selling feature

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Short toggle, Dashboard SHORT badges, Trade History all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: SHORT selling feature fully implemented and tested. Backend: allow_short field in config (GET/PUT /api/bot/config), positions have side field (LONG/SHORT), trades include side field. SHORT positions have SL above entry and TP below entry. Frontend: Config page has Short Selling toggle section with ENABLED/LONG ONLY badge, warning message when enabled. Dashboard shows SHORT positions with orange badges, LONG with blue. Trade History shows SIDE column with correct badges.

bug_fixed.issue: PositionCard and TradeRow components had hardcoded 'LONG' text instead of using position.side and trade.side
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to dynamic {position.side || 'LONG'} with conditional styling: orange for SHORT, blue for LONG

mocked_api_note: Trading bot runs in DRY (simulated) mode. No real trades. Binance API cannot connect from preview server.
